per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student provided clear and effective correction commands, but could have been more specific and detailed in some cases.
The student demonstrated a strong understanding of sorting and searching concepts, effectively applying them to provide correction commands.
The student could have iterated further to refine the solution, evaluating the effectiveness of the proposed solutions and refining them as needed.

justification: The student demonstrated a good understanding of steering concepts, but was held back by a lack of iteration and refinement in their solution, preventing them from achieving excellence
